title: John Swasey on 333NO SPOILERS
wikitext:
[]: John Swasey on 3.33(NO SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Toonsis » Fri Apr 12, 2013 1:48 am So, I know this is pretty irrelevant, and basically means nothing, but John Swasey, I'm sure as you all know, the English voice actor of Gendo, was asked about dubbing 3.33 at a recent con and answered back with a simple, "it's coming out". http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tiEX8HTZ4b0 This is the video. Around the 18:40 mark someone in the crowd asks about it and he answers. I don't know if that means they're working on it now or what, but I just figured I'd post it. Yes, like I just stated, it's basically known knowledge, but I like to stay active on the board and bring some form of productivity.

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Fri Apr 12, 2013 2:48 am Although i'm not a big fan of the dub, i still keep a version of each movie dubbed in my External HDD, it's great to see the dub will be coming soon.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Fri Apr 12, 2013 5:09 pm Well Funimation always announces its newly acquired licenses before even beginning production on the dub, since the Jap BD is not even out, Funi does not have the distribution rights yet, so I think he meant that it "will come out eventually"

[]:             Quote Post by Toonsis » Fri Apr 12, 2013 8:48 pm Stan wrote: Well Funimation always announces its newly acquired licenses before even beginning production on the dub, since the Jap BD is not even out, Funi does not have the distribution rights yet, so I think he meant that it "will come out eventually"

[]:             Quote Post by kboyrulez12345 » Fri Apr 12, 2013 11:30 pm Toonsis wrote: How would you know? I'm not trying to be an ass. I'm actually asking. I would think unless you work for Funimation, you can't be 100% about that sort of thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Sat Apr 13, 2013 12:21 pm Actually, it has been said by Funimation(sadly I can't find any quotes as of now, but their around, probably on their website in the forums), that they don't usually start working on the dub until the DVD comes out. That's how it's always been, and it's basically because that's the only time the Japanese will give Funimation the materials to start working on the dub. (Though their have been rare cases, I think with Studio Chibli movies.) Though that's a separate license, and mostly only for TV shows.

[]:             Quote Post by weeminator24 » Wed Apr 17, 2013 11:40 pm So since Disney owns copyright over Studio Ghibli in North America....we won't see a US release of "Giant God Warrior Appears in Tokyo" that is being included with the film in Japan...unless Disney gives Funi permission to include it...or unless they release it themselves...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Apr 18, 2013 12:55 am weeminator24 wrote: So since Disney owns copyright over Studio Ghibli in North America....we won't see a US release of "Giant God Warrior Appears in Tokyo" that is being included with the film in Japan...unless Disney gives Funi permission to include it...or unless they release it themselves...
